signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.magicLink: Sign in with a magic link
signIn.successDescription: You have been signed in successfully.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a password reset link.

errors.serverError: An error occurred. Please try again.

forgotPasswordVerify.title: Reset Password
forgotPasswordVerify.invalidLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
forgotPasswordVerify.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.serverError: An error occurred. The link may be invalid or expired.

magicLink.title: Magic Link
magicLink.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to sign in without a password.
magicLink.successDescription: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a sign-in link.

errors.serverError: An error occurred. Please try again.

magicLinkValidate.title: Magic Link
magicLinkValidate.successDescription: You have been signed in successfully.
magicLinkValidate.expired: This magic link has expired. Please request a new one.
magicLinkValidate.error: This magic link is invalid. Please request a new one.

signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.successDescription: A verification email has been sent to your address. Please check your inbox.

errors.serverError: An error occurred. Please try again.

verifyEmail.title: Email Verification
verifyEmail.successDescription: Your email address has been verified successfully.
verifyEmail.error: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.successDescription: Your password has been changed successfully.

errors.serverError: An error occurred. Please try again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: This action is irreversible. Please enter your credentials to confirm account deletion.
deleteAccount.successDescription: A confirmation email has been sent. Please check your inbox to complete the deletion.

confirm.title: Are you sure?
confirm.message: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be deleted.

errors.serverError: An error occurred. Please try again.

deleteAccountVerify.title: Account Deletion Confirmation
deleteAccountVerify.successDescription: Your account has been permanently deleted.
deleteAccountVerify.error: This deletion link is invalid or has expired.

mfaSetup.title: Set Up Two-Factor Authentication
mfaSetup.description: Enter your credentials to begin setting up two-factor authentication.
mfaSetup.scanDescription: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the code manually.
mfaSetup.recoveryDescription: Save these recovery codes in a safe place. You can use them to access your account if you lose your authenticator device.
mfaSetup.recoveryWarning: These codes will not be shown again.
mfaSetup.successDescription: Your account is now protected with two-factor authentication.

errors.serverError: An error occurred. Please try again.

mfaDisable.title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
mfaDisable.description: Enter your credentials and a verification code to disable two-factor authentication.

confirm.title: Are you sure?
confirm.message: Disabling two-factor authentication will make your account less secure.

mfaDisable.successDescription: Two-factor authentication has been removed from your account.

passwordRules.noKeyboardSequence: No keyboard sequences (e.g. qwerty, asdf, zxcv)
passwordRules.noUserInfo: Must not contain your email information

confirmation.canCloseTab: You can now close this tab.

redirection.countdown: You will be redirected in {{seconds}} seconds...

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
